title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 03 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 03 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 03 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.35 % today, the main contract closed 853.5.The traders' willingness to shipis more. The steel mills are active to purchase .The overall trading sentiment of the market is better.PBF at Shandong port deal 849-870 yuan/mt, decrease 2-9 yuan/ mt.PBF at Tangshan port deal 855-865 yuan/mt,decrease 5 yuan /mt. According to the inventory data of ten ports tracked by SMM, the total inventory of ten ports this week increased by 3.6% to 92.45 million tons compared with the previous year.
